# story-core

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Renderer-agnostic StoryNode IR plus buildStoryTree — the single place a block type maps to a structural role (divider → break, else content).
- Core:
  - Uses:
    - `page/divider.DIVIDER_TYPE`
    - `page/editor.plainOf`
    - `primitives/rank.Rank`
    - `primitives/tree.buildTree`
    - `primitives/tree.TreeNode`
  - Exports (types):
    - `StoryNode`
    - `StoryRole`
  - Exports (values):
    - `buildStoryTree`
    - `hashOutline`
    - `outlineToBullets`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
